2247690.name: Kula
2247690.description:
Kula has problems! You have to help him get through the world by avoiding the evil and pointed triangles. Jump, bounce and be fast in this original game by Mortie Productions. Specially designed to entertain children.

Jump away from the evil triangles

Jump away from the triangles and beat your own record to save Kula.

Goes forever

The game goes on forever, so the only way to save Kula is to beat your own record.

How to use the game

Use the arrow keys to move and the space bar to jump. No controller option in this game unfortunately.

Contents

Contains originally drawn characters and music from Mortie Productions.
